name: @dev-panel/pi-ext-create-file
description: Pi extension: create_file tool — safe replacement for Pi's built-in `write` when running weak coder models. Refuses >200 lines and refuses content shaped like nested JSON/dicts (Qwen3 failure mode: it serializes a multi-construct source file into a single pseudo-JSON string, then deletes the broken output). Forces the model into incremental construction via Pi's built-in `edit` (SEARCH/REPLACE) or `bash_exec` with heredoc.
